mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_TOPO_ALARM_STATS ( ELEMENT_DN, ELEMENT_TYPE, CRITICAL_COUNT, MAJOR_COUNT, MINOR_COUNT, WARNING_COUNT, CLEARED_COUNT, TOTAL_COUNT, UPDATED_TIME ) VALUES ( #{elementDn}, #{elementType}, #{criticalCount}, #{majorCount}, #{minorCount}, #{warningCount}, #{clearedCount}, #{totalCount}, #{updatedTime} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE CRITICAL_COUNT = #{criticalCount}, MAJOR_COUNT = #{majorCount}, MINOR_COUNT = #{minorCount}, WARNING_COUNT = #{warningCount}, CLEARED_COUNT = #{clearedCount}, TOTAL_COUNT = #{totalCount}, UPDATED_TIME = #{updatedTime}
mapper.update: UPDATE T_TOPO_ALARM_STATS SET CRITICAL_COUNT = #{criticalCount}, MAJOR_COUNT = #{majorCount}, MINOR_COUNT = #{minorCount}, WARNING_COUNT = #{warningCount}, CLEARED_COUNT = #{clearedCount}, TOTAL_COUNT = #{totalCount}, UPDATED_TIME = #{updatedTime} WHERE ELEMENT_DN = #{elementDn}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_TOPO_ALARM_STATS ( ELEMENT_DN, ELEMENT_TYPE, CRITICAL_COUNT, MAJOR_COUNT, MINOR_COUNT, WARNING_COUNT, CLEARED_COUNT, TOTAL_COUNT, UPDATED_TIME ) VALUES ( #{elementDn}, #{elementType}, #{criticalCount}, #{majorCount}, #{minorCount}, #{warningCount}, #{clearedCount}, #{totalCount}, #{updatedTime} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE CRITICAL_COUNT = CRITICAL_COUNT + #{criticalCount}, MAJOR_COUNT = MAJOR_COUNT + #{majorCount}, MINOR_COUNT = MINOR_COUNT + #{minorCount}, WARNING_COUNT = WARNING_COUNT + #{warningCount}, CLEARED_COUNT = CLEARED_COUNT + #{clearedCount}, TOTAL_COUNT = TOTAL_COUNT + #{totalCount}, UPDATED_TIME = #{updatedTime}
mapper.update: UPDATE T_TOPO_ALARM_STATS SET CRITICAL_COUNT = #{criticalCount}, MAJOR_COUNT = #{majorCount}, MINOR_COUNT = #{minorCount}, WARNING_COUNT = #{warningCount}, CLEARED_COUNT = #{clearedCount}, TOTAL_COUNT = #{totalCount}, UPDATED_TIME = #{updatedTime}, VERSION = VERSION + 1 WHERE ELEMENT_DN = #{elementDn} AND VERSION = #{version}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM T_TOPO_ALARM_STATS WHERE ELEMENT_DN IN
#{dn}
